name: com.mechanicsdsl.unity
description: Physically accurate simulation components for Unity generated by the MechanicsDSL compiler. Define physical systems in LaTeX-inspired DSL notation; deploy as drop-in MonoBehaviour components that bypass PhysX with Lagrangian equations of motion, Noether-based conservation monitoring, and real-time parameter tuning.

samples.description: A simple pendulum scene demonstrating PendulumComponent with Inspector parameter tuning, Gizmo visualisation, and Noether energy monitoring.
Chaotic double pendulum with phase space trajectory visualisation and sensitivity-to-initial-conditions demonstration.
